title: G and L Chat
description: To send to the Global Chat, you need to put before the message ( ! ) The local chat is visible up to 50 blocks away from the player.
body: Hi, I quickly created my mod, so unfortunately you won't be able to change its configuration (probably). I created this mod for small servers with support for mods only. I hope you enjoy the mod. The translation of the message, which is highlighted in yellow: "No one saw your message." If I have the strength to make an update to this mod by adding a config (if at all I can do it, lol),
